---
title: "verify_fish.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\debug\verify_fish.py"
loc: 33
complexity: 4
logic_score: 8.63
style_score: 3.98
intel_score: 8.67
overall_score: 5.00
---

## Intent
The `verify_fish.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on verify_system_integrity, IntegrityVerifier, verify. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via verify_system_integrity, IntegrityVerifier, verify. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 26 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.sentinel.muninn](file://src.sentinel.muninn)

### Exports
- `verify_system_integrity`
- `IntegrityVerifier`
- `verify`
